core_mechanism: large-N variational energy-minimization (equilibrium-measure) principle for a 2D system of particles interacting by logarithmic pairwise repulsion under an external confining potential, whose limiting density is a compactly-supported equilibrium measure filling a domain bounded by a sharp free boundary
brief_reason: The abstract shows that for a suitable class of confining potentials the asymptotic density of the (mutually repelling) eigenvalues becomes uniform with support in the interior of a simple smooth curve, which is exactly the compactly-supported equilibrium measure of a 2D logarithmic-repulsion gas in an external potential.
